content: I have known Arjun for 15 years. We were finalizing the sale of the disputed plot in Kharadi. The deal was settled on October 14th. I was at my office from 9 AM until 11 PM on the 15th. My security cameras show my car parked outside. I received a call from Nidhi Rao at 10:10 PM asking if the transfer was complete — I told her yes. I had no reason to kill Arjun. The land was legally mine. I never met him after 5 PM that day. I don’t know why someone would frame me. I have no idea about the DNA or the knife. I have never been to his house except for business meetings.
